    ΓêÜ returns empty array for null input (1 ms)

    ΓêÜ returns zero-summary for null
    ΓêÜ counts violations by type (1 ms)
    ΓêÜ tracks latest inspection date
    ΓêÜ handles inspections with no violations array (1 ms)

    ΓêÜ falls back to parameters when HTML has no matches (1 ms)
    ΓêÜ handles empty HTML
    ΓêÜ returns expected structure fields (1 ms)
